name: colony-game
description: Colony is a real-time social deduction game set in a post-apocalyptic cyberpunk ruin, built around **delegated programs **(a user's powers)**, hidden roles, and The Grid** (A game facilitator).

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc
scripts.stop: powershell -Command "$serverPid = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($serverPid) { Stop-Process -Id $serverPid -Force; Write-Host 'Stopped server on port 3000.' } else { Write-Host 'No server listening on port 3000.' }"
scripts.reset-db: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); ['colony.sqlite','colony.sqlite-shm','colony.sqlite-wal'].forEach((file) => fs.rmSync(file, { force: true })); console.log('Reset Colony SQLite files.');"
